We instantiate the pattern as a context-aware dashboard layer over the JSON decision logs of a previously published edge-based standing-water detection system, and analyse how the integration boundary admits standard generative-reliability mitigations as configuration- or middleware-level extension points. A structured expert review rated the pattern favourably across five ISO/IEC 25010-aligned quality dimensions, with strongest agreement on separation of concerns. End-user evaluation with agricultural stakeholders is planned for future work.
papers.comment: Accepted at CASA 2026 (9th Workshop on Context-Aware, Autonomous and Smart Architectures), co-located with ECSA 2026. 16 pages, 2 figures
papers.title_zh: 角色即配置：农业洪水的生成利益相关者报告
papers.summary_zh: 基于确定性边缘推理的网络物理系统（例如农田的车载洪水检测）会生成结构化决策日志，异构利益相关者必须对这些日志进行不同的解释。将此类系统与大型语言模型（LLM）配对以生成特定于利益相关者的报告会带来一种紧张：生成层是不确定的，而边缘平面必须保持可重播和可审计。我们提出了一种基于两个不变量的架构模式：单向消费，其中生成层是确定性平面的严格只读消费者，并且从不写回；以及角色即配置，其中利益相关者适应是版本化的提示模板工件，而不是运行时即兴创作。我们将该模式实例化为先前发布的基于边缘的静水检测系统的 JSON 决策日志上的上下文感知仪表板层，并分析集成边界如何允许标准生成可靠性缓解措施作为配置或中间件级扩展点。结构化专家评审在五个符合 ISO/IEC 25010 的质量维度上对该模式给予了好评，并在关注点分离方面达成了最一致的共识。计划在未来的工作中与农业利益相关者进行最终用户评估。

papers.title: Seg2Grasp: A Robust Modular Suction Grasping in Bin Picking
papers.summary: Current bin picking methods that rely heavily on end-to-end learning often falter when confronted with unfamiliar or complex objects in unstructured environments. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Seg2Grasp, a modular pipeline designed for robust suction grasping in dynamic and cluttered bin scenarios. Seg2Grasp is built on a three-step process: Segmentation, Grasping, and Classification. The Segmentation module employs a Transformer-based model to generate class-agnostic object masks from RGB-D images, ensuring accurate detection across various conditions. The Grasping module uses surface normals and mask proposals to determine the optimal suction points, enhancing grasp success. Finally, the Classification module leverages fine-tuned open-vocabulary Mask-CLIP for precise object identification, enabling versatile handling of diverse objects. Real-world robotic experiments demonstrate that Seg2Grasp outperforms existing methods in success rates and adaptability, establishing it as a powerful tool for automated bin picking in industrial settings.
papers.comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Published in the 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2024)
papers.title_zh: Seg2Grasp：箱式拣选中稳健的模块化吸力抓取装置
papers.summary_zh: 当前严重依赖端到端学习的垃圾箱拣选方法在非结构化环境中遇到不熟悉或复杂的物体时往往会出现问题。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了 Seg2Grasp，这是一种模块化管道，专为在动态和杂乱的垃圾箱场景中进行稳健的吸力抓取而设计。 Seg2Grasp 建立在三步过程之上：分割、抓取和分类。分割模块采用基于 Transformer 的模型从 RGB-D 图像生成与类别无关的对象掩模，确保在各种条件下进行准确检测。抓取模块使用表面法线和掩模建议来确定最佳吸力点，从而提高抓取成功率。最后，分类模块利用微调的开放词汇 Mask-CLIP 进行精确的对象识别，从而实现对不同对象的多功能处理。现实世界的机器人实验表明，Seg2Grasp 在成功率和适应性方面优于现有方法，使其成为工业环境中自动垃圾箱拣选的强大工具。

papers.title: Attention from Above: A Multimodal Model for Drone-Based Object Localization
papers.summary: Drone-based object detection technology has advanced rapidly, becoming increasingly sophisticated and efficient. Recently, research trends have expanded beyond the detection of predefined objects toward the identification of specified target objects. For example, desired targets can be specified through textual prompts, enabling accurate detection of objects of interest. To address this demand, this paper proposes an efficient multimodal-based object detection model aimed at improving small object detection performance. The proposed method is built upon the YOLO-World framework and replaces the C2f layers used in the YOLOv8 backbone with attention-based A2C2f layers. This modification enables more precise representation of local features, particularly for small objects or objects with well-defined boundaries. In addition, the incorporation of attention mechanisms and parallel processing structures significantly enhances the model's computational accuracy. Comparative experiments conducted on the VisDrone dataset demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the original YOLO-World model. Specifically, precision increases from 43.0% to 45.1%, recall from 32.8% to 35.0%, the F1 score from 37.2% to 39.4%, mAP@0.5 from 32.5% to 35.2%, and mAP@0.5-0.95 from 18.5% to 19.9%, confirming a substantial improvement in detection accuracy. These results verify that the proposed approach provides an effective and highly accurate solution for object detection in drone-based image and video application environments.
papers.comment: Preprint. Accepted for publication in the International Journal of Interactive Mobile Technologies
papers.title_zh: 上面的注意：基于无人机的目标定位的多模态模型
papers.summary_zh: 基于无人机的物体检测技术发展迅速，变得越来越复杂和高效。最近，研究趋势已经从预定义对象的检测扩展到指定目标对象的识别。例如，可以通过文本提示指定所需目标，从而能够准确检测感兴趣的物体。为了满足这一需求，本文提出了一种高效的基于多模态的目标检测模型，旨在提高小目标检测性能。该方法建立在 YOLO-World 框架之上，并用基于注意力的 A2C2f 层替换了 YOLOv8 主干中使用的 C2f 层。这种修改可以更精确地表示局部特征，特别是对于小物体或具有明确边界的物体。此外，注意力机制和并行处理结构的结合显着提高了模型的计算精度。在 VisDrone 数据集上进行的对比实验表明，所提出的模型优于原始 YOLO-World 模型。具体来说，准确率从43.0%提高到45.1%，召回率从32.8%提高到35.0%，F1分数从37.2%提高到39.4%，mAP@0.5从32.5%提高到35.2%，mAP@0.5-0.95从18.5%提高到19.9%，证实了检测精度的大幅提高。这些结果验证了所提出的方法为基于无人机的图像和视频应用环境中的目标检测提供了有效且高度准确的解决方案。

papers.title: Early Yield Prediction for Sugar Beet Fields using Satellite Data -- Learnings from Specialized Vision Transformers
papers.summary: Remote sensing has become an increasingly valuable tool for agricultural monitoring, particularly through the use of publicly available satellite imagery. However, effectively integrating domain knowledge into machine learning methods remains challenging. This study presents a real-world example of early sugar beet harvest yield forecasting from purely optical Sentinel-2 imagery, demonstrating how a tight integration of domain knowledge and machine learning can lead to synergistic gains. We empirically find that using very small vision transformer patch sizes and all available Sentinel-2 spectral bands improves our model despite being uncommon design choices in the domain. As a practical contribution, we were able to identify a large fraction of low-yield fields in a different year early on in the growth cycle through a modified training setup and a ranking-based detection of underperforming fields.
papers.title_zh: 使用卫星数据预测甜菜田的早期产量——从专业视觉变压器中学到的知识
papers.summary_zh: 遥感已成为农业监测越来越有价值的工具，特别是通过使用公开的卫星图像。然而，将领域知识有效地整合到机器学习方法中仍然具有挑战性。这项研究提出了一个通过纯光学 Sentinel-2 图像预测早期甜菜收获产量的真实示例，展示了领域知识和机器学习的紧密结合如何能够带来协同收益。我们凭经验发现，使用非常小的视觉变换器贴片尺寸和所有可用的 Sentinel-2 光谱带可以改善我们的模型，尽管在该领域是不常见的设计选择。作为一项实际贡献，我们能够通过修改培训设置和基于排名的表现不佳领域检测来识别生长周期早期不同年份的大部分低产领域。

papers.title: MixDiffusion: Mixing Diffusion-based Uni-condition Text-to-Image Generation Models for Multi-condition Image Synthesis
papers.summary: Recent advances in text-to-image (T2I) generation have enabled controllable image synthesis by incorporating conditions beyond text. However, most existing diffusion-based methods are limited to a single type of control condition (e.g., bounding boxes or keypoints), which restricts their flexibility. To address this limitation, we propose MixDiffusion, a training-free diffusion framework for multi-condition T2I generation. MixDiffusion theoretically supports an arbitrary number of control conditions, including bounding boxes, keypoints, sketches, depth maps, reference images, and text, by collaboratively integrating multiple pre-trained uni-condition diffusion models. The key insight of the proposed approach is to derive the predicted noise distribution in each denoising step of the diffusion-based multi-condition image generation model from the predicted noise distributions of multiple diffusion-based uni-condition models with a derived integration formula, which is supported by rigorous theory proof. Owing to its training-free nature, MixDiffusion is easy to deploy and readily extensible to new control modalities.
papers.title_zh: MixDiffusion：混合基于扩散的统一条件文本到图像生成模型，用于多条件图像合成
papers.summary_zh: 文本到图像 (T2I) 生成的最新进展通过结合文本之外的条件实现了可控图像合成。然而，大多数现有的基于扩散的方法仅限于单一类型的控制条件（例如边界框或关键点），这限制了它们的灵活性。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 MixDiffusion，一种用于多条件 T2I 生成的免训练扩散框架。 MixDiffusion 理论上通过协作集成多个预训练的单一条件扩散模型来支持任意数量的控制条件，包括边界框、关键点、草图、深度图、参考图像和文本。该方法的关键思想是利用导出的积分公式，从多个基于扩散的单条件模型的预测噪声分布中导出基于扩散的多条件图像生成模型的每个去噪步骤中的预测噪声分布，该公式得到严格的理论证明的支持。由于其免训练的性质，MixDiffusion 易于部署并易于扩展到新的控制模式。

papers.title: TypiCore: A Hybrid Active Query Strategy for Class-Incremental Learning on Time Series
papers.summary: Time series data play a pivotal role across numerous domains, including healthcare and manufacturing. In real-world environments, models must cope with distribution shifts over time, a challenge commonly addressed through Continual Learning (CL) techniques. However, existing CL methods face a critical limitation: real-world data streams are rarely fully labeled, making annotation cost a major practical constraint. This paper investigates Active Class-Incremental Learning (ACIL) for multivariate time series, where a model must sequentially learn new classes while selectively querying labels under a fixed annotation budget. We present a systematic evaluation of a wide range of query strategies combined with multiple rehearsal-based approaches, assessing their impact on plasticity, stability, and label efficiency across four benchmark datasets. Our analysis reveals the limitations of uncertainty-based and distribution-aware methods in achieving strong performance under constrained labeling budgets. To address these shortcomings, we propose TypiCore, a novel hybrid query strategy that alternates between typicality-based and diversity-based sample selection across active learning cycles, enabling the construction of memory buffers that are both representative and diverse. Evaluated on the TSCIL benchmark, TypiCore delivers statistically significant improvements over all baselines and matches or surpasses fully supervised continual learning performance on multiple datasets while requiring a fraction of the available labels.
papers.title_zh: TypiCore：时间序列类增量学习的混合主动查询策略
papers.summary_zh: 时间序列数据在包括医疗保健和制造在内的众多领域中发挥着关键作用。在现实环境中，模型必须应对分布随时间的变化，这是通常通过持续学习（CL）技术解决的挑战。然而，现有的 CL 方法面临着一个关键的限制：现实世界的数据流很少被完全标记，这使得注释成本成为主要的实际限制。本文研究了多变量时间序列的主动类增量学习（ACIL），其中模型必须顺序学习新类，同时在固定注释预算下选择性地查询标签。我们对各种查询策略与多种基于演练的方法相结合进行了系统评估，评估了它们对四个基准数据集的可塑性、稳定性和标签效率的影响。我们的分析揭示了基于不确定性和分布感知的方法在标签预算有限的情况下实现强劲性能的局限性。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了 TypiCore，一种新颖的混合查询策略，它在主动学习周期中交替基于典型性和基于多样性的样本选择，从而能够构建具有代表性和多样性的内存缓冲区。根据 TSCIL 基准进行评估，TypiCore 在所有基线上提供了统计上的显着改进，并且在多个数据集上匹配或超过完全监督的持续学习性能，同时只需要一小部分可用标签。

papers.title: A Dual-Hypothesis Reasoning Framework for LLM Guardrails
papers.summary: We propose ARBITER, a novel LLM guardrail framework that introduces two key ideas: (i) dual-hypothesis reasoning, a reasoning method for LLM guardrails that explicitly considers both safe and unsafe interpretations of a prompt before making a safety decision, and (ii) multi-component supervised fine-tuning (MC-SFT), a structured training loss for reasoning-based guardrails that decomposes LLM outputs into logical components and weights them according to their importance. Existing reasoning-based guardrails often rely on expensive procedures, such as generating reasoning traces using larger or closed-source teacher models and applying full-parameter fine-tuning. In contrast, ARBITER uses a cost-effective self-generation strategy for reasoning traces and LoRA-based parameter-efficient fine-tuning while still achieving better performance than these expensive approaches. Additionally, ARBITER provides faithful evidence-phrase explanations for unsafe decisions, enabling a more transparent and interpretable guardrail method. Experiments on three safety moderation benchmarks show that ARBITER outperforms existing reasoning-based and non-reasoning guardrail baselines, with clear gains in out-of-domain evaluations.
papers.title_zh: LLM Guardrails 的双假设推理框架
papers.summary_zh: 我们提出了 ARBITER，一种新颖的 LLM 护栏框架，它引入了两个关键思想：（i）双假设推理，一种用于 LLM 护栏的推理方法，在做出安全决策之前明确考虑提示的安全和不安全解释；以及（ii）多组件监督微调（MC-SFT），一种基于推理的护栏的结构化训练损失，它将 LLM 输出分解为逻辑组件，并根据其重要性对其进行加权。现有的基于推理的护栏通常依赖于昂贵的程序，例如使用更大或闭源教师模型生成推理轨迹并应用全参数微调。相比之下，ARBITER 使用经济高效的自生成策略来推理轨迹和基于 LoRA 的参数高效微调，同时仍然比这些昂贵的方法获得更好的性能。此外，ARBITER 为不安全的决策提供忠实的证据短语解释，从而实现更加透明和可解释的护栏方法。对三个安全审核基准的实验表明，ARBITER 的性能优于现有的基于推理和非推理的护栏基线，并且在域外评估方面取得了明显的进步。

papers.title: CommitLLM: A Fine-Tuned Pipeline for Git Commit Message Generation
papers.summary: Developers frequently write uninformative git commit messages such as "fix" or "update stuff", degrading the value of version-control history for code review, debugging, and onboarding. We present CommitLLM, a three-stage pipeline that generates concise, Conventional Commits-compliant messages from code diffs using a fine-tuned small language model. The system combines (1) QLoRA fine-tuning of Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2 on the CommitPackFT dataset, (2) constrained decoding to enforce brevity, and (3) deterministic post-processing to strip conversational artifacts and enforce format. On a 50-sample evaluation, CommitLLM achieves 98% format compliance (vs. 22% for vanilla Mistral), reduces average output length from 154.8 to 37.9 characters, and improves LLM-as-a-Judge scores from 1.97 to 3.68 out of 5. Notably, the post-processing layers contribute more to quality improvement than the fine-tuning itself, suggesting that for structured-output tasks, treating the LLM as a component in a deterministic pipeline is more effective than optimizing the model alone. The entire system runs on a single consumer GPU (NVIDIA T4, 16 GB VRAM).
papers.title_zh: CommitLLM：用于生成 Git 提交消息的微调管道
papers.summary_zh: 开发人员经常编写无信息的 git 提交消息，例如“修复”或“更新内容”，从而降低了版本控制历史记录对于代码审查、调试和入门的价值。我们提出了 CommitLLM，这是一个三阶段管道，它使用微调的小语言模型从代码差异生成简洁的、符合常规提交的消息。该系统结合了 (1) CommitPackFT 数据集上 Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2 的 QLoRA 微调、(2) 约束解码以加强简洁性，以及 (3) 确定性后处理以去除对话工件并加强格式。在 50 个样本的评估中，CommitLLM 实现了 98% 的格式合规性（而普通 Mistral 为 22%），将平均输出长度从 154.8 个字符减少到 37.9 个字符，并将 LLM 作为法官的分数从 1.97 提高到 3.68（满分 5 分）。值得注意的是，后处理层比微调本身对质量改进的贡献更大，这表明对于结构化输出任务，处理LLM 作为确定性流程中的一个组成部分比单独优化模型更有效。整个系统在单个消费级 GPU（NVIDIA T4、16 GB VRAM）上运行。

papers.title: TraversRL: Traversable Pedestrian Pathway Generation With Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Automatically generating pedestrian pathways from aerial images requires producing a connected network suitable for routing, not just detecting where sidewalks appear. Sidewalks and crossings, in contrast to roads, may be partially occluded, implicitly defined, and exhibit complex connectivity patterns. Existing segmentation-based approaches focus on labeling pixels to infer segments, but often produce disconnected or fragmentary graphs that are unreliable for navigation. We introduce TraversRL, a vision-conditioned model that iteratively grows a pathway network from an aerial image, simulating a traveler navigating the built environment. TraversRL uses an action space of short and long direction-distance segments designed to adapt to complex patterns and span occlusions, and uses a combination of graph-level and step-wise rewards to balance overall connectivity with precise edge placement. Across three visual backbones and three intersection datasets, TraversRL substantially improves buffered IoU with the ground-truth graph relative to a state-of-the-art segmentation baseline, and more than doubles metrics of connectivity. Moreover, combining global and local rewards produces cleaner graphs with fewer spurious branches while further improving overall performance. These results demonstrate that modeling pathway extraction as a sequential decision process from the perspective of a traveler, while optimizing for final graph quality with reinforcement learning, produces significantly more reliable pedestrian networks.
papers.title_zh: TraversRL：通过强化学习生成可穿越的行人通道
papers.summary_zh: 从航空图像自动生成行人通道需要生成适合路由的连接网络，而不仅仅是检测人行道出现的位置。与道路相比，人行道和十字路口可能被部分遮挡、隐式定义，并表现出复杂的连接模式。现有的基于分段的方法侧重于标记像素以推断分段，但通常会生成不可靠的导航或不可靠的图表。我们引入了 TraversRL，这是一种视觉调节模型，可以根据航拍图像迭代地生成路径网络，模拟旅行者在建筑环境中导航。 TraversRL 使用短和长方向距离段的动作空间，旨在适应复杂的模式和跨度遮挡，并使用图级和逐步奖励的组合来平衡整体连接性与精确的边缘放置。在三个视觉主干和三个交叉数据集上，TraversRL 相对于最先进的分割基线，通过真实图显着改善了缓冲 IoU，并且连接性指标增加了一倍以上。此外，结合全局和本地奖励可以产生更清晰的图表，减少虚假分支，同时进一步提高整体性能。这些结果表明，从旅行者的角度将路径提取建模为顺序决策过程，同时通过强化学习优化最终图形质量，可以产生更加可靠的行人网络。

papers.title: SkyVLaM: Multimodal Large Language Model for UAV Video Understanding in Remote Sensing
papers.summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly improved remote sensing (RS) multimodal understanding. Language-conditioned segmentation is crucial for fine-grained target understanding in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos. However, this task remains challenging due to the prevalence of small, visually ambiguous targets and dynamic aerial perspectives. In this paper, we propose SkyVLaM, a multimodal large language model for UAV video understanding. SkyVLaM constructs sparse tokens directly from patch-level video representations through a temporal basis perceiver, regularizes the sparse basis to encourage complementary temporal cues, and adaptively selects a temporally coherent dense segment for high-resolution inspection. The resulting sparse and dense tokens are jointly processed by a large language model for query-conditioned segmentation. We further build SkyVid, consisting of SkyVid-VGCG and SkyVid-RVOS for video grounded conversation generation and referring video object segmentation, respectively. SkyVid contains 101 videos, 33.6K frames, and 1.53M pixel-level object instances. Experiments show that SkyVLaM provides a more effective allocation of the visual token budget and improves language-conditioned video segmentation in UAV scenarios.
papers.title_zh: SkyVLaM：遥感中无人机视频理解的多模态大语言模型
papers.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型 (MLLM) 的最新进展显着提高了遥感 (RS) 多模态理解。语言条件分割对于无人机 (UAV) 视频中的细粒度目标理解至关重要。然而，由于小型、视觉模糊目标和动态空中视角的普遍存在，这项任务仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 SkyVLaM，一种用于无人机视频理解的多模态大语言模型。 SkyVLaM 通过时间基础感知器直接从补丁级视频表示构建稀疏标记，规范稀疏基础以鼓励互补的时间线索，并自适应地选择时间相干的密集片段进行高分辨率检查。由此产生的稀疏和密集标记由大型语言模型联合处理，以进行查询条件分割。我们进一步构建了 SkyVid，由 SkyVid-VGCG 和 SkyVid-RVOS 组成，分别用于视频基础对话生成和参考视频对象分割。 SkyVid 包含 101 个视频、33.6K 帧和 153 万像素级对象实例。实验表明，SkyVLaM 提供了更有效的视觉令牌预算分配，并改进了无人机场景中的语言条件视频分割。

papers.title: From Perception to Assistance: Open-Vocabulary Shared Autonomy for Robotic Manipulation
papers.summary: Teleoperating a robotic manipulator in industrial environments demands precision that camera-based interfaces alone struggle to deliver. The operator must align the end-effector with a target in clutter, under limited depth perception, and without colliding with the surrounding structures. This paper presents a shared-autonomy framework that assists the operator throughout this process. A single RGB-D camera captures the operator's arm motion and hand gestures without wearables, fiducials, or a calibration stage. The intended target is specified by a free-form text prompt, grounded by a vision-language model in the robot's gripper camera, and tracked across its onboard cameras by a promptable video-segmentation model, resulting in a grasp frame continuously separated from the obstacle map. Every commanded motion is executed by a GPU-accelerated model-predictive controller that enforces self- and environment-collision avoidance against an online volumetric reconstruction, while a potential field corrects the operator's reference toward the grounded target during the final approach. An autonomous mode can be gesture-triggered to complete the grasp on the same target without a separate perception pipeline. The framework is validated on a quadruped mobile manipulator. The interface achieves a positional RMSE of 59 mm relative to motion-capture ground truth, and the controller keeps the arm at least 18 cm from obstacles while the operator deliberately commands the arm into them by 6 cm. In an industrial valve manipulation and a pick-and-place task, the full framework succeeded in all trials, while ablating either the collision or the assistance module produced failures through complementary mechanisms, and autonomous execution succeeded in four of five trials per task.
papers.title_zh: 从感知到协助：机器人操作的开放词汇共享自主性
papers.summary_zh: 在工业环境中远程操作机器人操纵器需要精确度，而仅基于摄像头的界面很难提供这种精确度。操作员必须在有限的深度感知下将末端执行器与混乱中的目标对齐，并且不与周围结构发生碰撞。本文提出了一个共享自治框架，可以在整个过程中为操作员提供帮助。单个 RGB-D 摄像头可捕获操作员的手臂运动和手势，无需可穿戴设备、基准点或校准台。预期目标由自由格式的文本提示指定，以机器人抓取相机中的视觉语言模型为基础，并通过提示视频分割模型在其机载相机上进行跟踪，从而产生与障碍物地图连续分离的抓取框架。每个指令运动均由 GPU 加速的模型预测控制器执行，该控制器针对在线体积重建强制避免自碰撞和环境碰撞，而势场则在最终接近过程中纠正操作员对接地目标的参考。自主模式可以通过手势触发来完成对同一目标的抓取，而无需单独的感知管道。该框架在四足移动机械臂上进行了验证。该界面相对于运动捕捉地面实况实现了 59 毫米的位置 RMSE，并且控制器使手臂与障碍物保持至少 18 厘米的距离，而操作员故意命令手臂进入障碍物 6 厘米。在工业阀门操纵和拾放任务中，完整的框架在所有试验中都取得了成功，同时通过补充机制消除了碰撞或辅助模块产生的故障，并且自主执行在每个任务的五次试验中有四次取得了成功。

papers.title: A Systematic Evaluation of Trajectory Data Curation for LoRA Fine-Tuning of Code Agents
papers.summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of open-weight LLMs on expert agent trajectories has emerged as a prominent approach to building capable code agents without reliance on proprietary models. A central yet underexplored question is how trajectory quality and quantity jointly shape model performance. We present a systematic empirical study of trajectory data filtering for LoRA fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct on the SWE-trajectory dataset (67,074 trajectories, of which 32,161 are resolved). We propose a two-axis quality scoring framework -- Efficiency and Style -- and evaluate it through 16 controlled experiments spanning strategy, scale, and ablation analyses. Since 7B-scale models attain near-zero SWE-bench resolve rates, we adopt cross-entropy (CE) loss on held-out trajectories as the primary metric, validated via first-action generation: CE loss and ROUGE-L are perfectly rank-correlated (Spearman $ρ$ = -1.00), with limited-sample evidence supporting but not conclusively establishing this proxy. Our results reveal a scale-dependent quality-quantity trade-off: at small scales, doubling the dataset (500 to 1,000) yields ~12.7% CE-loss reduction whereas the TopQ-Random gap stays <1% (Mann-Whitney p > 0.10); at 2,000 trajectories this same gap widens to 3.6% (p = 0.016). Ablation further identifies error-retry rate as the dominant sub-dimension, performing comparably to the full composite ($Δ$ < 0.2%). Together, these findings establish trajectory-level quality scoring as a viable but scale-sensitive lever for code-agent SFT and offer a proxy-validated evaluation protocol for the regime where end-to-end resolve rate is statistically infeasible.
papers.comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. Author's accepted manuscript of a paper published in the ICIC 2026 proceedings (oral presentation)
papers.title_zh: 用于 LoRA 代码代理微调的轨迹数据管理的系统评估
papers.summary_zh: 开放式权重法学硕士在专家代理轨迹上的监督微调（SFT）已成为在不依赖专有模型的情况下构建有能力的代码代理的重要方法。一个尚未得到充分探索的核心问题是轨迹质量和数量如何共同塑造模型性能。我们针对 SWE 轨迹数据集（67,074 条轨迹，其中 32,161 条已解析）上的 Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct 的 LoRA 微调提出了轨迹数据过滤的系统实证研究。我们提出了一个两轴质量评分框架——效率和风格——并通过 16 个涵盖策略、规模和消融分析的对照实验对其进行评估。由于 7B 规模模型的 SWE 基准解析率接近于零，因此我们采用保留轨迹上的交叉熵 (CE) 损失作为主要指标，通过第一行动生成进行验证：CE 损失和 ROUGE-L 完全排名相关（Spearman $ρ$ = -1.00），有限样本证据支持但不能最终建立该代理。我们的结果揭示了一种依赖于尺度的质量-数量权衡：在小尺度上，将数据集加倍（500 到 1,000）可以使 CE 损失减少约 12.7%，而 TopQ-Random 差距保持 <1%（Mann-Whitney p > 0.10）；在 2,000 条轨迹上，同样的差距扩大到 3.6% (p = 0.016)。消融进一步将错误重试率确定为主要子维度，其性能与完整复合材料相当（$Δ$ < 0.2%）。总之，这些发现将轨迹级质量评分确立为代码代理 SFT 的可行但规模敏感的杠杆，并为端到端解析率在统计上不可行的制度提供了经过代理验证的评估协议。

papers.title: C3DIR: A Deep Learning 3-Dimensional Cloud Property Retrieval Scheme for Passive Satellite Imagers
papers.summary: We develop the Cloud 3-Dimensional Imager Retrieval (C3DIR), a deep learning model that estimates 3-D cloud properties for multiple passive satellite imagers trained to match retrievals from the Earth Cloud Aerosol and Radiation Explorer(EarthCARE) ACM-CAP product. This work is aimed towards moving AI/ML 3-D cloud algorithms closer towards operational use. C3DIR predicts the occurrence water content of ice, cloud liquid, and rain along the imager line-of-sight and uses a voxel-level collocation approach to account for the misaligned viewing geometries of passive imagers and active profiling instruments. This precise collocation methodology allows for constructing vertical profiles using voxels contained by multiple imager pixels to facilitate comparisons with active profiling instruments. Qualitative case studies show that C3DIR can accurately depict multiple distinct overlapping cloud layers, albeit with some smoothing. Quantitative evaluations illustrate that C3DIR overall excels at hydrometeor detection which intuitively tends to be a function of water content. However, detection of voxels classified as liquid cloud remains difficult due to the their small geometric thickness, finer horizontal scale, and frequent tendency to be obscured or embedded within ice clouds. In general, water content estimation is reasonably accurate, yielding the best results in ice clouds but uncertainties remain for liquid and rain water content. Column-integrated water paths are in tighter agreement with EarthCARE. Comparisons with the algorithms underpinning current NOAA operational products highlight several areas where C3DIR may offer improvement. Overall, these results demonstrate the potential for C3DIR to provide flexible 3-D output depicting vertically resolved cloud structure which can offer broader utility for aviation applications, numerical weather modeling, and climate research.
papers.title_zh: C3DIR：一种用于无源卫星成像仪的深度学习三维云属性检索方案
papers.summary_zh: 我们开发了云 3 维成像仪检索 (C3DIR)，这是一种深度学习模型，可估计多个被动卫星成像仪的 3-D 云特性，这些卫星成像仪经过训练，可与地球云气溶胶和辐射探测器 (EarthCARE) ACM-CAP 产品的检索相匹配。这项工作旨在使 AI/ML 3D 云算法更接近操作使用。 C3DIR 预测沿成像仪视线出现的冰、云液体和雨水的含水量，并使用体素级搭配方法来解决被动成像仪和主动分析仪器未对准的观察几何形状。这种精确的配置方法允许使用多个成像器像素包含的体素构建垂直轮廓，以便于与主动分析仪器进行比较。定性案例研究表明，C3DIR 可以准确地描绘多个不同的重叠云层，尽管需要进行一些平滑处理。定量评估表明，C3DIR 总体上在水凝物检测方面表现出色，直观上，水凝物检测往往是含水量的函数。然而，由于液体云的体素几何厚度小、水平尺度更精细以及经常被模糊或嵌入冰云中的趋势，检测被分类为液体云的体素仍然很困难。一般来说，水含量估计相当准确，在冰云中产生最好的结果，但液体和雨水含量仍然存在不确定性。柱式集成水路与 EarthCARE 更加一致。与支撑当前 NOAA 运营产品的算法的比较突出了 C3DIR 可以提供改进的几个领域。总体而言，这些结果证明了 C3DIR 提供灵活的 3D 输出来描述垂直解析的云结构的潜力，这可以为航空应用、数值天气建模和气候研究提供更广泛的实用性。
